rag_rules: Fix type mismatches by ensuring left-hand side of '=>' expressions are boolean types
Resolve 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors by tracing unresolved identifiers on the same line
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE contracts
Ensure type consistency between declarations and expressions in AGREE
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid component type or implementation scopes
Assignments in implementation contracts must target existing output features or declared variables
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes
Do not add architecture elements to fix AGREE type errors
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE annex placement and scope rules for assumptions and guarantees
